abilities.description: Target Goblin, Orc, or Pirate can't be blocked this turn.
abilities.target_prompt: Select target Goblin, Orc or Pirate

triggers.description: Whenever CARDNAME deals combat damage to a player, amass Orcs 3. (Put three +1/+1 counters on an Army you control. It's also an Orc. If you don't control an Army, create a 0/0 black Orc Army creature token first.)
